channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Tropical Storm Oscar moves through central, southeastern Bahamas
item.description: Tropical Storm Oscar moves through the central and southeastern Bahamas, The National Hurricane Center said.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: NFL stadiums could lose $11 billion from climate threats by 2050: report
item.description: “This report is a wake-up call for the NFL, stadium owners, and local governments,” said Climate X CEO Lukky Ahmed.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas homicide suspect became obsessed with coworker, murdered her over her 'long' work breaks, police say
item.description: Travis Merrill, 51, has been charged him homicide after he allegedly shot Tamhara Collazo at her desk. He told police he was obsessed with her and was angry at breaks she took.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Delta crew member reportedly made Marine remove 'threatening' shirt
item.description: A Marine Corps veteran from the San Francisco Bay Area was temporarily removed from a Delta flight on Wednesday by a crew member who deemed her T-shirt to be “threatening,” according to a local report.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KTLA 5

item.title: Despite Trump's visit, McDonald's says it does not endorse candidates
item.description: McDonald's is emphasizing its political neutrality after former President Donald Trump spent some time behind the counter at one of its Pennsylvania locations.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, KTLA 5

item.title: Migrants caught at border bused, flown out of San Diego in possible 'cover up' before election: official
item.description: A San Diego County official criticized the flying of illegal immigrants out of California to other states so close to the presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: McDonald's says it doesn't endorse political candidates after Trump visit
item.description: McDonald's is emphasizing its political neutrality after former President Donald Trump spent some time behind the counter at one of its Pennsylvania locations.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, ABC 4

item.title: Suspect accused of killing newlywed nurse had been 'deliberately cruel': report
item.description: New details are revealed in court documents surrounding an Oregon man accused of killing a nurse reported missing days after returning home from her wedding.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sean 'Diddy' Combs faces 7 new lawsuits, including alleged rape of 13-year-old
item.description: Seven new lawsuits have been filed against Sean ‘Diddy’ Combs, including one alleging the rape of a 13-year-old girl. They come as his lawyers tried again Monday to get him freed on bail, and complained that a “fresh wave of publicity” is endangering his right to a fair criminal trial.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Navy identifies 2 killed in fighter jet crash as aviators from California
item.description: The Navy identified on Monday the two crew members who died last week in a jet fighter crash near Mount Rainier as two 31-year-old aviators from California. Lt. Cmdr. Lyndsay P. Evans, a Naval Flight Officer, and Lt. Serena N.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Tourists return to NYC's Vessel sculpture after it reopens with netting to prevent deaths
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Tourists once again climbed the steps of Manhattan's beehive-shaped Vessel sculpture after it reopened Monday for the first time in three years, now with netting aimed at decreasing the risk of suicides like the ones that forced its closure.
item.dc:creator: CEDAR ATTANASIO and John Minchillo, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: PHOTOS: White House public tour gets makeover with 'reimagined' visitor experience
item.description: The White House public tour is getting an extreme makeover, with new digital exhibits, an expanded route and more access to rooms poised to be part of the "reimagined" experience for visitors.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Girl still missing after disappearing on 1976 high school trip in the Smokies
item.description: When she was last seen, Gibson was about 5'3" tall, and weighed around 115 pounds with light brown hair.
item.dc:creator: Hope McAlee, NewsNation

item.title: White House proposes insurers cover cost of over-the-counter birth control
item.description: “At a time when contraception access is under attack, Vice President Harris and I are resolute in our commitment to expanding access to quality, affordable contraception,” Joe Biden said.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Walmart and Aldi are once again offering meal deals for Thanksgiving
item.description: The two companies are advertising their dinners at "inflation-free" or "pre-inflation" prices, respectively.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, NewsNation

item.title: Illegal immigrants arrested in Florida for sex trafficking 15-year-old runaway girl from NYC
item.description: A 15-year-old girl from New York City was rescued from a sex trafficking ring in Florida that was run by two illegal immigrants, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Democrats urge Biden to push Israel for press freedom in Gaza
item.description: Dozens of House Democrats are pressing the Biden administration to get tougher on Israel when it comes to press freedoms in Gaza, warning that a lack of media access in the war-torn territory has stifled any push for accountability surrounding military operations that have killed tens of thousands o
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, NewsNation

item.title: Top Republican super PAC jumps into Nebraska Senate race
item.description: A top Republican super PAC is jumping into the Nebraska Senate race as incumbent Sen. Deb Fischer (R) struggles to put away her race against Independent Dan Osborn. The Senate Leadership Fund (SLF), a group run by allies of Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Paul Di'Anno, former Iron Maiden lead singer, dies at 66
item.description: Paul Andrews, better known by his stage name, Paul Di'Anno of Iron Maiden fame has died at the age of 66.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Still using 'LOL'? That could mean you are getting old
item.description: As time has seen several follow-up iterations, including ROFL and LMAO, the original "laugh out loud" acronym is a telltale sign that who you are talking to may be a millennial.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, NewsNation

item.title: Murder suspect 'deliberately cruel' in Melissa Jubane's final moments, prosecutors say
item.description: Bryce Schubert, 27, has been charged with first-degree murder, kidnapping, and abuse of a corpse in the case of Melissa Jubane, a nurse who was found dead two days after she went missing in early September.
item.dc:creator: Aimee Plante, NewsNation

item.title: Walmart and Aldi are once again offering meal deals for Thanksgiving
item.description: The two companies are advertising their dinners at "inflation-free" or "pre-inflation" prices, respectively.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What is pink cocaine? Autopsy finds drug in Liam Payne's body
item.description: A partial autopsy conducted on former One Direction singer Liam Payne found multiple substances in his system when he fell to his death from the third-floor balcony of a hotel room in Argentina last week, according to a new report from ABC News.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, KRON4

item.title: Trump bashes FEMA, NC governor as he tours Helene storm damage
item.description: Former President Trump on Monday attacked the federal response to Hurricane Helene by repeating debunked claims about funding and bashed North Carolina Gov. Roy Cooper (D) during a stop in storm-ravaged Asheville, N.C.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How does abortion translate? Ballot measures are a challenge for interpreters
item.description: Reproductive rights measures are on the ballots in 10 states after heated debates over how to describe their impact on abortion — and that's just in English. In 388 places across the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL WARREN, GEOFF MULVIHILL and PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Auraria Campus police officer shot in Denver, suspect arrested
item.description: An Auraria Campus Police officer was wounded in a shooting on campus in Denver while trying to apprehend a suspect who officials say was trespassing into a car.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Who is Lucifer 'Justin Case' Everylove? Meet the presidential candidate who is only on Utah's ballots
item.description: Who is Lucifer "Justin Case" Everylove? Here's how this unaffiliated presidential candidate made it onto the ballots in Utah.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, KRON4

item.title: White House proposes insurers cover cost of over-the-counter birth control
item.description: The White House on Monday announced a proposal that would require insurers to cover the cost of forms of contraception like over-the-counter birth control pills and condoms under the Affordable Care Act.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Still using 'LOL'? That could mean you are getting old
item.description: As time has seen several follow-up iterations, including ROFL and LMAO, the original "laugh out loud" acronym is a telltale sign that who you are talking to may be a millennial.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Harris raises more than $220 million in September, outraising Trump 3-to-1
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris’s campaign raised nearly $222 million in September, raising more than three times as much as former President Donald Trump’s campaign.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KRON4

item.title: Over 1 million voters cast early ballots in North Carolina
item.description: Nearly 1.01 million North Carolinians have already voted in the November general election, state officials reported on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, KRON4

item.title: Georgia dock walkway collapse cause under investigation as islanders describe 'horrible' aftermath
item.description: Those who witnessed a deadly gangway collapse in Georgia over the weekend are detailing what happened when dozens plunged into the water, killing seven.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Texas man whose execution was halted doesn't appear at state Capitol after subpoena
item.description: A Texas man whose execution was halted because of a last-ditch subpoena won't testify in person before lawmakers.
item.dc:creator: Nadia Lathan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Helicopter crashes into radio tower in Houston, killing 4
item.description: Officials say four people aboard a tour helicopter were killed when it crashed into a radio tower in Houston and burst into flames.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: In Nevada, immigration is a nuanced issue. But the politics of it is painted in black and white
item.description: Immigrants, as well as those who work closely with them, say both sides’ efforts to crack down on the border have clouded the larger immigration issue in ways often too nuanced to break down cleanly along ideological lines.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Oscar brings winds, heavy rains to eastern Cuba after striking the Bahamas
item.description: HAVANA (AP) — Tropical Storm Oscar brought heavy rains and winds to Cuba, an island already beleaguered by a massive power outage, late Sunday after brushing the Bahamas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
